name: lolgpt
description: AI-powered League of Legends mock match simulator and summoner playstyle analyzer
author: LoL Mock Match Team

remote.note: Run with PORT env var set to serve Streamable HTTP at /mcp (e.g. on Render). Without PORT, runs as stdio.

tools.name: league_of_legends_summoner_vs_match
tools.description: Simulates a mock League of Legends match between two summoners from LoLGPT(롤지피티), based on each summoner's last 10 games

uidA.description: Riot ID of the first summoner

tagA.description: Tagline of the first summoner, without #

uidB.description: Riot ID of the second summoner

tagB.description: Tagline of the second summoner, without #

lang.description: Output language (EN, 한국어, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 日本語, ESPAÑOL, বাংলা, ਪੰਜਾਬੀ, Tiếng Việt)

tools.returns: Markdown summary with both summoners' recent stats and a phase-by-phase mock match progression

tools.name: analyze_summoner_playstyle
tools.description: Analyzes a League of Legends summoner's playstyle from LoLGPT(롤지피티): play type, signature champion, and champion recommendations

lang.description: Output language (EN, 한국어, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 日本語, ESPAÑOL, বাংলা, ਪੰਜਾਬੀ, Tiếng Việt)

tools.returns: Markdown summary of the summoner's play type, signature champion, and recommended/avoid champions

debug.description: Enable debug mode for detailed logging

lol_api_url.description: Base URL for League of Legends API

network.description: Required to fetch summoner data and run match simulations from League of Legends API

disclaimer: League of Legends mock match simulations are for entertainment purposes only. Results are based on historical performance data and do not guarantee actual match outcomes. League of Legends is a trademark of Riot Games, Inc.
